The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating various infections. The bioactive constituents of Claytonia perfoliata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
